frontier: Erdős #979: smallest N = p³+q³+r³ (three prime cubes, p≤q≤r) in exactly 6 ways — OEIS A385316 a(6). Current known: a(1..5) = {24, 185527, 8627527, 999979163, 10588881419}, lower bound a(6) > 4.99×10¹¹ established on DGX at C=10¹¹.
action:
Milestone: verifier_construction; contract=sha256:8d51fc61fba0b1e156ad8e3f452b419d28072672bca2b1a6f006cf81817c23cc
Built and locally replayed an exact-prime-set multiplicity verifier (a385316_verifier.py) that enumerates all nondecreasing prime-cube triples summing to ≤C, counts exact multiplicities, and validates both domain membership and target-predicate satisfaction via kill fixtures.
verified:
Domain kill fixtures: 2/2 rejected correctly
Predicate kill fixtures: 2/2 rejected correctly
Verifier domain: N is a positive integer representable as p^3+q^3+r^3 with p,q,r prime, p<=q<=r; confirmed 2 domain-bad fixtures (N=7, N=2) correctly rejected as not representable as 3 prime cubes
Verifier predicate: count_multiplicity(N, P) == k for claimed multiplicity k; confirmed 2 predicate-bad fixtures (N=24 with 1 rep, N=185527 with 2 reps) correctly rejected as having != 6 representations
OEIS reproduction: 5/5 terms matched exactly at C=1.06×10¹⁰ using 327 primes ≤ (1.06×10¹⁰)^(1/3) = 2196, 4,574,818 distinct sums enumerated
Artifact: a385316_verifier.py, SHA-256: 9a9e907d6bb214a32ba42aa85b7d611dab35b686162fb3e1069b589d290f9ec7
Deterministic replay confirmed: exit 0, identical output on repeated run.
result: Verifier construction complete and verified. Kill fixtures all pass with branch coverage (domain and predicate). All five OEIS terms reproduced exactly. The C=10¹⁰ sweep confirms the verifier methodology but does not reach a(6) — that requires C significantly higher. The accepted continuation (sha256:15eab0c...) certified a(6) > 10¹¹ at C=10¹¹ on DGX. Advancing to C=10¹³ requires DGX SSH (spark-38e3.local) which is unavailable from this Mac.
next_gate: Operator with DGX SSH access must execute the same verifier at C=10¹³. If a k=6 candidate appears, report it; if not, advance bound to a(6) > 10¹³ and escalate to C=10¹⁴ or a heuristic/construction approach.
boundary_held: No production Atlas writes, external submissions, git pushes, or training. Local Mac verifier replay only.
